message:
Fix 8 bugs found during hands-on user interview testing

- Fix cherry-pick/revert/reset crash: validate inputs, accept field aliases
- Initialize repo_meta on git push (ensureRepo in receive-pack)
- Index commits on git push so stats/contributors work for pushed repos
- Fix /show endpoint to resolve refs, not just raw SHAs
- Fix stats commit count: use log walk instead of incomplete SQLite index
- Add diff/changed files to commit detail page with A/M/D indicators
- Add active tab indicator using client TabLink with usePathname
- Render README markdown (headings, bold, italic, code, links)
